final:
module RefModule(
   input         D,
   input         clk,
   input         rst,
   output reg    Q  
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if(rst) begin
            Q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            Q <= D;
        end
    end
endmodule
